intro.speaker: Caller
intro.text: My house is possessed, Vern! Objects flying everywhere!

development.speaker: Caller
development.text: Dishes! Chairs! My cat flew across the room!

conclusion.speaker: Vern
conclusion.text: Cats jump. That's what they do.

conclusion.speaker: Caller
conclusion.text: *laughing* Okay yeah, I was just messing around.

intro.speaker: Caller
intro.text: A demon appeared at the foot of my bed last night!

development.speaker: Caller
development.text: Red eyes, horns, the whole thing! Spoke in Latin!

conclusion.speaker: Vern
conclusion.text: That's sleep paralysis. Or a bad burrito.

conclusion.speaker: Caller
conclusion.text: Haha, yeah it was the burrito. My bad!

intro.speaker: Vern
intro.text: {callerName} from {callerLocation}, what's happening at your place?

intro.speaker: Caller
intro.text: Full-on poltergeist activity, Vern. Blood coming out of the walls.

development.speaker: Vern
development.text: Blood from the walls. Have you had the plumbing checked?

development.speaker: Caller
development.text: It's not rust! It's actual blood! I tasted it!

conclusion.speaker: Vern
conclusion.text: You tasted mystery wall liquid. That's your first problem.

conclusion.speaker: Caller
conclusion.text: *snickering* Alright, you caught me. Just wanted to be on the show.

intro.speaker: Caller
intro.text: Vern, I captured a ghost on camera. Clear as day.

development.speaker: Vern
development.text: Really? Can you describe the footage?

development.speaker: Caller
development.text: Full apparition, white dress, floating down my hallway.

conclusion.speaker: Vern
conclusion.text: Send it to the station. We'll analyze it.

conclusion.speaker: Caller
conclusion.text: Yeah... it's actually my sister in a sheet. Sorry, Vern!

intro.speaker: Caller
intro.text: VERN! The ghost TOUCHED me! Ice cold hand on my shoulder!

development.speaker: Vern
development.text: Physical contact! That's rare! What happened next?!

development.speaker: Caller
development.text: It whispered my name! Then vanished into thin air!

conclusion.speaker: Vern
conclusion.text: This is incredible! Can you come on for an interview?!

conclusion.speaker: Caller
conclusion.text: *bursting out laughing* I'm so sorry, it was all fake!
